title: A Train Through the Mountains
content: The train journey through the mountains became one of the highlights of Marcus’s trip. Large windows provided spectacular views of valleys, rivers, forests, and distant peaks covered with snow. Passengers frequently moved between seats to photograph the scenery. Marcus spent most of the journey simply looking outside and enjoying the changing landscape. Small villages occasionally appeared between mountains before disappearing again. Unlike air travel, the train allowed him to appreciate the gradual transition between regions. By the time he reached his destination, he felt that the journey itself had been an attraction.
